title: Pi Network (PI) Price Forecast & Scenarios
content: Analyzing the price movement of Pi Network (PI) requires a focused examination of its supply metrics and historical market performance. As of {{LIVE_DATE}}, the token maintains a presence in the market, though it faces unique challenges compared to established giants like XRP and Solana. | Metric | Details | | :--- | :--- | | Live Price | {{LIVE_PRICE}} | | Market Cap | {{LIVE_MARKET_CAP}} | | Market Rank | {{LIVE_RANK}} | | 24H Change | {{LIVE_24H_CHANGE}} | ## Recent Market Action Pi Network has experienced notable volatility over the past year. Historical data indicates a one-year high of $1.242423 and a low of $0.132353, reflecting a change of -79.69%. In the last 30 days, the price has seen a 10.13% change, with a range spanning from $0.159709 to $0.272161. This performance suggests the token is currently finding its footing within a neutral global market phase. ## Key Price Levels Given the current price of {{LIVE_PRICE}}, immediate support is identified near the $0.13 range, consistent with its recent yearly lows. Resistance levels are more complex due to the significant distance from its all-time high of $2.99. Breaking through the $0.25 mark would be a significant technical signal, provided volume sustains upward momentum. ## Valuation Scenarios Market participants often consider three scenarios for assets with high retail engagement. In a 'bear' scenario, the token might test its $0.13 support if network migration stalls. A 'base' scenario assumes sideways consolidation as the ecosystem matures. The 'bull' case is contingent upon mass-scale adoption of the Pi app ecosystem, which could shift the current $1.77 billion market cap closer to larger L1 peers. ## Risk Profile TokenRadar assigns a Risk Score of 9 to this asset. This is driven by high volatility and the current concentration of supply, which remains an unknown variable for many retail investors. High-risk assets often experience wider fluctuations than established protocols, necessitating caution in position sizing. ## Sector Comparison When compared to the high-throughput capabilities of Solana or the institutional cross-border utility of XRP, Pi Network remains a speculative play. Its success relies entirely on the successful conversion of its mobile mining base into active on-chain users. Unlike Solana, which has solidified its status in DeFi and NFTs, Pi is still in the phase of defining its primary market value. --- *Disclaimer: This article is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Always do your own research (DYOR).*
